title: Lhasa, Tibet — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Lhasa, Tibet: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Lhasa is a city in Tibet with a population of 867,000. The spiritual heart of Tibet at 3,650 meters elevation, home to the Potala Palace, Jokhang Temple, and a unique Buddhist culture.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
